zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Lusignan於1262年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，她的父親Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune28歲，母親Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche24歲。她於1283年10月11日之前與Piers de Geneville在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年4月13日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀享年61歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Lusignan于1262年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南时，她的父亲Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune28岁，母亲Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche24岁。她于1283年10月11日之前与Piers de Geneville在英国英格兰史洛普爾盧德洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年4月13日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀享年61岁，埋葬在法国波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Lusignan was born in 1262, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune, was 28 and her mother, Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, was 24. She married Piers de Geneville before 11 October 1283, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 13 April 1323, in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Lusignan est née en 1262, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Piers de Geneville avant 11 octobre 1283, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1323, à Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Lusignan 1262 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune 28 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche 24. Sie hat vor 11. Oktober 1283 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Piers de Geneville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. April 1323 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Lusignan è nata il nel 1262 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Piers de Geneville prima del 11 ottobre 1283, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1323, nel Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Lusignanが1262年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignan XII, Bruneは28歳，母Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marcheは24歳であった。1283年10月11日以前にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウでPiers de Genevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年4月13日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンモントモーイロンコウheで61歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンモントモーイロンコウheにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Lusignan(이)가 1262년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1283년 10월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 Piers de Geneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 4월 13일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 몽모릴런 코우he에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 몽모릴런 코우he에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Lusignan nasceu em 1262, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Piers de Geneville antes 11 de outubro de 1283, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1323, em Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Lusignan родилась в 1262 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Piers de Geneville перед 11 октябрь 1283 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 апреля 1323 г. в местности коухe, монтмориллон, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности коухe, монтмориллон, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Lusignan nació en 1262, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Piers de Geneville antes de 11 de octubre de 1283, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1323, en Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
